title: Koreas MSL Season 4 Opening is Eva Themed
display_title: Koreas MSL Season 4 Opening is Eva Themed
wikitext:
[]: Korea's MSL Season 4 Opening is Eva-Themed .             Quote Post by Armitage » Sun Nov 29, 2009 12:49 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Sc9pMqgsXM&feature=player_embedded I laughed too hard .

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Nov 29, 2009 1:11 pm MSL is a professional Starcraft thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Nov 29, 2009 1:50 pm Was that The Beast II playing?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Nov 29, 2009 6:11 pm O god why

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Nov 30, 2009 2:49 am The dude should have taken an attempt at an Eva roar. Would have been hilarious.

[]:             Quote Post by Ambrosia » Tue Dec 08, 2009 4:08 pm Too funny.

[]:             Quote Post by nickdolemailbox » Tue Dec 22, 2009 3:27 am That's just plain awesome and badass.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Dec 22, 2009 2:40 pm Wait wut haha but none the less that sounded awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Wed Dec 23, 2009 2:47 am SaltyJoe wrote: The dude should have taken an attempt at an Eva roar. Would have been hilarious.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Wed Dec 23, 2009 1:47 pm Ah, those Koreans...
